name: trimmi-de base dev environment
description: Shared dev-container setup for trimmi-de repos: rtk (Rust Token Killer) + rtk-mcp, aider (AI pair programming, DeepSeek default / OpenRouter via a host-mounted ~/.aider_env), gh auth from a host-mounted ~/.gh_token_env, Claude Code config, common VS Code extensions and env. Pulls in python 3.14, github-cli, rust, and claude-code as dependencies and ships the shared post-create/post-start lifecycle scripts.

installRtk.description: Install rtk + rtk-mcp (Rust Token Killer) and wire the global hook.

rtkVersion.description: rtk release tag to install the prebuilt binary for (e.g. v0.43.0), or 'latest'. rtk-mcp has no prebuilt binaries and always builds from source.

installAider.description: Install aider (AI pair programming) via uv, with DeepSeek as the default model. API keys come from a host-mounted ~/.aider_env.
